title: JPG to PNG Converter
description: Convert JPG images into PNG format with high quality.

faq.question: Will image quality change?
faq.answer: PNG uses lossless compression, so no additional quality loss occurs during conversion.

faq.question: Can I upload JPEG files?
faq.answer: Yes. Both .jpg and .jpeg formats are supported.
